title: Expose a read-only INSIGHTS projection
description: Publish the exact plan, Budget Position, and snapshot-bound dated actual evidence contract that INSIGHTS may consume while retaining BUDGET ownership of plan mutations and position calculation. Implements G7 and supports UC-BUDGET-003.
rationale: INSIGHTS needs trustworthy raw inputs, but interpretation and report persistence must remain downstream.
story_want: INSIGHTS to consume the same exact budget baseline
story_so_that: analysis cannot diverge from the position the owner can reconcile
acceptance_criteria: Given a version-compatible INSIGHTS consumer, when it requests plan or position data, then BUDGET returns the same exact domain result and provenance available through the owner read contract.

Given the INSIGHTS projection schema, when it is inspected, then period identity, explicit planState, optional plan revision detail and Budget Position, exact entries and totals when bound, bounded dated actual members, category lifecycle evidence, public LEDGER actual totals, and snapshot provenance are represented without collapsing plan-absence states.
Given the INSIGHTS projection schema, when it is inspected, then pace, forecast, trend, anomaly, recommendation, narrative, alert, and durable report-snapshot fields are absent.
Given an INSIGHTS caller, when available BUDGET capabilities are enumerated, then no Create Draft, Activate Plan Revision, or other mutation authority is granted through the consumer projection.
Given an unsupported BUDGET projection version, when INSIGHTS requests data, then BUDGET returns a stable compatibility failure and no partial projection.
Given INSIGHTS stores or interprets a returned projection, when BUDGET state is inspected, then no report, recommendation, or consumer-specific state was created.

Given a version-compatible INSIGHTS consumer, when capabilities are enumerated, then budget.plan.revision.get, budget.position.get, and budget.insights.evidence.get are the complete allowed read set and no mutation operation is present.

Given budget.insights.evidence.get resolves BoundRevision, when BUDGET produces evidence, then one immutable plan revision and one complete public LEDGER actuals snapshot supply both the canonical Budget Position calculation and every returned dated actual member, with identical snapshot identity, generation fingerprint, exact totals, and one binding fingerprint.

Given a LEDGER correction concurrent with budget.insights.evidence.get, when the producer captured the snapshot before or after the correction, then the result is wholly pre-correction or wholly post-correction; if one binding cannot be proven, Source State Changed is returned with no partial projection.

Given a member-count or output-size limit breach, when budget.insights.evidence.get is validated, then a stable resource failure is returned before financial output and no alternate private read, cursor handoff, duplicate calculation, or consumer state is created.

Given the selected Budget Period has No Budget Plan, or has no Active Budget Plan Revision and no explicit revision selector, when budget.insights.evidence.get succeeds, then that exact planState is returned, planRevisionDetail and BudgetPosition are absent, and one complete public LEDGER snapshot still supplies bounded dated members and exact ledgerBudgetActualTotal without inventing a zero plan, revision, position, or Not Found.

Given a No Budget Plan or No Active Budget Plan Revision evidence result, when its binding is verified, then every dated member appears exactly once, their checked exact sum equals ledgerBudgetActualTotal, and BudgetPositionCalculator is not invoked; correction, compatibility, completeness, integrity, and resource failures remain fail-closed with no partial projection.
